windows.transcript: Hello everyone, welcome back to my channel. So in this video we are going to discuss how to make perfect, perfect mold candles.
windows.old_description: White silicone bubble moulds and finished candles.
windows.embed_text_v2: display of finished decorative candles, cream and purple bubble cube candles, twisted spiral pillars, pink ribbed pillar and rose floral candle arranged on black marble, intro montage
windows.summary_v2: Opening montage panning over an array of finished decorative candles (bubble cubes, spiral pillars, rose candle) displayed on dark marble.

seconds_v2.desc: Overhead intro shot of finished candles on a dark marble plate: cream cube/bubble candles and a twisted spiral pillar, with purple bubble candles behind.
Camera pans across the arrangement, showing white bubble-cube candles and a carved cream spiral pillar beside purple bubble candles.
View shifts to the purple bubble-cube candles and cream ones on the glossy black marble surface.
Closer on a cluster of lilac bubble candles with white wicks, cream bubble candles in the foreground.
Pan reveals a cream spiral pillar candle and a carved purple pillar beside rows of white and purple bubble candles.
Soft crossfade transition; finished bubble candles in cream, purple and pink blend across the frame.
Purple and cream bubble candles arranged in a wooden tray, with a pink rose-shaped candle below; faint box label visible.
Overhead of bubble candles in a wooden tray, a pink ribbed pillar at right and a pink floral rose candle in foreground.
Wider view of purple and cream bubble candles in the wooden tray beside a pink ribbed pillar candle on dark marble.

windows.transcript: Sometimes you might have seen some issues with your candle, like patches on your candles or cracks on your candles. So in this video

windows.summary_v2: Continuation of the intro montage panning over finished decorative candles including bubble cubes, a pink ribbed pillar and a pink rose candle.

seconds_v2.desc: Overhead of finished candles continuing the intro: rows of cream and purple bubble-cube candles in a wooden tray beside a pink ribbed pillar candle on black marble.
Camera pans across cream and lilac bubble candles in the tray, a carved purple pillar and pink ribbed cup candle at right.
Closer view of purple and cream bubble candles, a carved spiral purple pillar and a pink ribbed candle in the foreground.
Focus shifts to a tall pink ribbed/fluted pillar candle standing beside cream and purple bubble candles.
Tighter crop of the pink ribbed pillar candle and the cream bubble candle next to it on the dark surface.
Pan reveals cream bubble candles and a pink rose-shaped candle emerging at bottom of frame.
Overhead of a pink floral rose candle beside cream bubble candles in a wooden tray, light glinting off marble.
Closer on the pink rose-cluster candle with cream bubble candles behind on the glossy black surface.
Final view of the pink rose candle centered, flanked by cream and purple bubble candles in the tray.

windows.embed_text_v2: weighing solid soy wax chunks into stainless steel pouring pitcher on white digital kitchen scale, hand adding white wax slabs, measuring wax on wooden table
windows.summary_v2: Solid white wax chunks are weighed into a stainless steel pouring pitcher on a digital kitchen scale.

seconds_v2.desc: Overhead view of a stainless steel pouring pitcher holding chunks of white solid wax, sitting on a white digital kitchen scale on a wooden table; a bag of wax at left.
Same setup, scale display glowing green showing the weight as the wax-filled metal pitcher rests on the platform.
The pitcher of white wax slabs remains on the scale; a small jar of wick stickers and a glass sit at upper right.
A hand lowers another white wax slab into the steel pitcher, adding to the load being weighed.
The hand presses a chunk of solid white wax down into the pitcher on the lit scale.
More wax added; a thick white wax slab leans inside the steel pitcher on the green-lit scale.
The pitcher now fuller with white wax pieces; scale display continues showing the increasing weight.
A gloved/bare hand pushes additional white wax into the pitcher to reach the target weight.
Hand settles the last wax chunk into the pitcher on the digital scale, finishing the weigh-out.

windows.old_description: Pouring wax into the silicone moulds.
windows.embed_text_v2: pouring melted purple wax from metal pitcher into white silicone six-cavity mould, wicks held by wooden clothespins, filling rectangular candle moulds on wooden table
windows.summary_v2: Melted purple wax is poured from a metal pitcher into a six-cavity silicone mould with clothespin-centered wicks.

seconds_v2.desc: Overhead of a white silicone mould with six scalloped-rectangle cavities, wicks held centered by wooden clothespins; a flower-shaped mould with dark wax and an oven mitt sit nearby on a wooden table.
Same top-down setup before pouring; a metal pour pitcher with purple wax waits at the left edge of the six-cavity mould.
The clothespin-held wicks stay centered in the empty mould cavities as the purple-wax pitcher hovers at left.
The pour begins: pale purple melted wax streams from the metal pitcher into the first mould cavity.
Purple wax fills a cavity and overflows slightly onto the mould surface as pouring continues.
Pitcher moves along, pouring lilac wax into successive cavities of the silicone mould.
More cavities now filled with dark purple wax; the pour continues steadily from the metal pitcher.
Most of the six cavities are filled with purple wax, wicks still clamped upright by clothespins.
Pouring nearly complete; the mould holds purple wax in its cavities with the pitcher tipped at left.
